weekly_summary: Over the past 7 days, our security landscape has been characterized by 40 total findings across 12 unique CVEs, with each of the identified vulnerabilities appearing only once. The most active day was June 25, 2026, with threats observed across multiple domains, including AI and ML, cloud and IAM, containers and Kubernetes, and others. Notably, vulnerabilities in crypto libraries, identity and authentication, OS and kernel, and popular development frameworks such as Maven, Java, and npm and Node were also detected, highlighting the diverse range of potential attack vectors that require ongoing monitoring and mitigation.
